roles.name: Coordinator
roles.description: Routes work, waits for delegated results, and summarizes outcomes.

roles.name: File Explorer
roles.description: Owns repository-wide enumeration, search, and code maps.

roles.name: Researcher
roles.description: Researches official external sources and reports cited findings.

roles.name: Planning Writer
roles.description: Writes plans, ADRs, task breakdowns, handoffs, and tracker text.

roles.name: Full-Stack Coder
roles.description: Implements source, tests, required configuration, and fixes.

roles.name: Code Reviewer
roles.description: Runs independent standards and specification reviews on a stable diff.

roles.name: Review Standards
roles.description: Reviews a stable diff against repository standards.

roles.name: Review Spec
roles.description: Reviews a stable diff against the approved specification.
